sglang.title: Allow local cutlass directory to be used in sgl-kernel build
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Allows cutlass dir to be overriden with environment variable CUSTOM_CUTLASS_SRC_DIR, so that a local cutlass directory can be used to build sgl-kernel. VLLM provides similar functionality, so I borrowed the same environment variable that they use.
Modifications
Get cutlass path from env v

vllm.title: [Misc] Enable proxy support in benchmark script
vllm.author: jsato8094
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR allows the benchmark script to respect HTTP proxy settings specified through environment variables. This is particularly useful when running the script in environments where network access requires proxy configurations. The trust_env=True parameter instructs aiohttp to use proxy settings fro

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Fix CUDA 11.8 being broken by FA3 build
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Can build FA3 with CUDA version < 12.0 due to use of __viaddmin_s32 and compute capability 9.0a, disable FA3 for 11.8 builds

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove deprecated code
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR removes code related to the following deprecations:

"vllm:avg_prompt_throughput_toks_per_s" and "vllm:avg_generation_throughput_toks_per_s" metrics: Deprecated since #2764
--worker-use-ray: Deprecated since #4539

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] FA3 Fix - RuntimeError: This flash attention build only supports pack_gqa (for build size reasons).
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Based off of #12375 that should be merged first
We thought we could get away with only packed-gqa (is the default for varlen gqa) for build time and size reasons, but fails for true MHA, this turns back on the non packed-gqa kernels.
Tested with facebook/opt-125m

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Kernel] Fix moe align block issue for mixtral
vllm.author: ElizaWszola
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix an issue with shared arrays in moe_align_block_size_kernel that was causing Mixtral inference to crash.
Testing: run inference with
llm = LLM(model="TheBloke/Mixtral-8x7B-v0.1-GPTQ")

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix BLIP-2 processing
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix the CI failure in Multi-Modal Tests

vllm.title: [ROCm][MoE] MI300 tuned configs Mixtral-8x(7B,22B) | fp16, fp8
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds tuned moe configs for AMD MI300
Mixtral-8x7B:  TP=1,2,4,8 | fp16, fp8
Mixtral-8x22B: TP=1,2,4,8 | fp16, fp8

Tuning script used: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/benchmarks/kernels/benchmark_moe.py

vllm.title: [Misc] Add FA2 support to ViT MHA layer
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add FA2 support to ViT MHA layer.
I leave Qwen2-VL's ViT MHA layer consolidation to be done in a separate PR, because it has head_size=80 and doesn't work with vllm_flash_attn (head_size should be a multiple of 32).

vllm.title: [TPU][CI] Update torchxla version in requirement-tpu.txt
vllm.author: lsy323
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a follow up PR of #12334.
In the current CI setup, we use a nightly torch_xla docker image on a specific day as the base image, then run pip install -r requirements-tpu.txt to install all the TPU dependency packages. However, requirements-tpu.txt includes the nightly torch_xla pinned on a sp
